title: TASK GRAPH: VinFast Callbot
summary: Dependency-mapped task graph cutting BLUEPRINT.md into 23 tasks across 4 waves, assigning each to Track A (dialogue/eval) or Track B (audio/ASR/TTS/normalization) with acceptance criteria and constraints.
key_decisions: D1: PhoWhisper-CT2 as default ASR; generic faster-whisper as fallback
D2: normalization runs per-field after LLM extraction (not pre-LLM)
D3: parse_failed flag returned by Normalizer instead of raising exceptions
D4: silence-timeout / Ctrl-C caught in pipeline.turn(), calls engine.finalize() directly
D5: WER audio clips must be real Vietnamese speech with spoken numbers
D6: B14 audio collection slotted into Track B idle time days 4-6
D7: LLM-as-judge uses strongest available cloud model at dev time, documented, not in submission runtime
D8: setup.ps1/sh pulls Ollama model + ASR/TTS weights with minimum-HW note
D9: values.py holds allowed values for vehicle_type / vehicle_usage_type / customer_type
D11: latency reported as p50/p95 per component (ASR/LLM/TTS) and E2E
D12: requirements.txt pins langgraph and langchain-core with == versions
Measurement Gate: measure template-only vs LLM latency in Wave 1, E2E latency before any optimization
tasks: TASK-A21: Eval harness + slot F1 + exception tests [A]
